Step 0 of 4 — Brand Foundation

7-Step Strategic Foundation

Complete this before generating creative. Your answers seed the Motivator Lab and inform every hook the AI writes. This is strategy, not admin.

1
Brand Truth
What does this brand do better than anyone? What's the gap between what exists and what customers actually feel?
▼
2
Audience Architecture
Who is actually buying this, and what does membership in this group mean to them?
▼
3
Cultural Context
Where does this brand have permission to play? What conversations can it authentically enter?
▼
4
Emotional Target
What single feeling should someone have after seeing this ad?
▼
5
Strategic Disruption
What category cliché can this brand subvert? Where's the white space?
▼
6
Proof Point
What's the single most concrete, specific thing that makes this brand believable?
▼
7
Format Fit
How does the platform shape the message? What formats are available and what does each demand?
▼
✅ Validation Gate
Before generating creative, complete this one-liner test. If you can't fill it in, the strategy isn't tight enough yet.
We make for who feel and want to feel .
✓ Saved

36%
Creative Diversification Score
Format Coverage 70%Lo-fi / Hi-fi Balance 30%
How it's calculated

Format Coverage (70%): % of the 18 active formats represented in your asset list. Having 1 asset per format scores the same as 10 — the score rewards breadth, not volume. Lo-fi / Hi-fi Balance (30%): target is ~50/50. Full points at balance; score decays linearly as ratio skews past 60/40 in either direction.
